items.title: microsoft/markitdown
items.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
items.author: microsoft
items.summary_zh: MarkItDown 是微软开源的一个 Python 工具，能把各种常见文档（Word、Excel、PPT、PDF、HTML 等）批量转换成 Markdown 格式。对于需要将非结构化文档喂给大语言模型或者做文本分析的开发者来说，这简直是神器——因为大多数 AI 工具处理结构化文本（如 Markdown）都比原始二进制文件要好。它简洁、依赖少、输出质量高，尤其适合做 RAG（检索增强生成）的文档预处理环节。
items.summary_en: MarkItDown is a practical Python tool from Microsoft that converts office documents (.docx, .xlsx, .pptx, etc.), PDFs, HTML, and more into clean Markdown. Why does this matter? Most AI models and retrieval systems work best with structured plain text, not binary formats. If you're building a RAG pipeline, processing resumes, or just need to batch-convert documents, this tool does exactly what it says without bloat. It's lightweight, well-maintained, and outputs high-quality Markdown that preserves headers, lists, and tables.

items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.author: iptv-org
items.summary_zh: 这个项目收集了全球各地公开可用的IPTV频道，让你能轻松观看来自世界各国的电视节目。对于热爱探索不同文化节目或身处海外想收看家乡频道的人来说，它提供了一个免费且便捷的聚合入口，无需繁琐的订阅流程。重要的是，它完全开源并由社区维护，频道列表会持续更新，有效解决了寻找稳定免费IPTV源的常见痛点。
items.summary_en: iptv-org/iptv is a community-maintained collection of freely available IPTV channels from around the world. It aggregates thousands of live TV streams into a single, structured playlist, making it easy to explore international TV content without expensive subscriptions. This open-source project solves the headache of finding reliable, free IPTV sources by keeping the list constantly updated. Anyone interested in global TV content—from expats to cord-cutters—can benefit by simply loading the playlist into any compatible player.

items.title: garrytan/gstack
items.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
items.author: garrytan
items.summary_zh: GStack是YC合伙人Garry Tan分享的一套Claude Code配置，包含23个高度定制化的工具，分别扮演CEO、设计师、工程经理、发布经理、文档工程师和QA等角色。它为开发者提供了一种将AI助手融入软件团队工作流的实战方案，帮助团队自动完成决策、设计评审、版本管理、文档撰写和测试验证等任务。对于希望提升团队协作效率、减少重复性工作的技术团队来说，GStack是一份可复用的“AI增强型”团队模板，展示了如何利用大语言模型重构现代软件开发流程。
items.summary_en: GStack is a curated Claude Code setup by YC partner Garry Tan, featuring 23 opinionated tools that act as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA. It offers developers a practical way to integrate AI assistants into software team workflows, automating decisions, design reviews, release management, documentation, and testing. For teams looking to boost collaboration and reduce repetitive tasks, GStack serves as a reusable AI-augmented team template, demonstrating how large language models can reshape modern software development processes.

items.title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
items.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
items.author: harry0703
items.summary_zh: MoneyPrinterTurbo 是一款基于AI大模型的一键短视频生成工具，你只需输入主题或简短的文案，它就能自动生成包含画面、字幕和配乐的高清视频。它大幅节省了内容创作者在视频制作上耗费的时间和精力，尤其适合需要快速产出大量短视频的自媒体运营和营销人员。其巧妙之处在于利用大语言模型理解内容并智能匹配视觉元素，让创意到成片的过程变得前所未有的简单高效。
items.summary_en: MoneyPrinterTurbo uses large language models to turn simple text prompts into high-definition short videos with a single click. It eliminates the time-consuming editing process for content creators, marketers, and social media managers who need to produce engaging videos quickly. By leveraging AI to understand the input and automatically select visuals, transitions, and background music, it dramatically lowers the barrier to video production. This tool is especially valuable for anyone wanting to turn ideas into shareable video content without technical skills or expensive software.

items.title: opendatalab/MinerU
items.description: Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.
items.author: opendatalab
items.summary_zh: MinerU 是一个开源工具，能够把 PDF 和 Office 文档自动转换成 Markdown 或 JSON 格式，让大语言模型可以直接读取和处理。它解决了非结构化文档难以喂给 AI 的痛点，特别适合需要构建自动化工作流的开发者和企业，比如搭建知识库或智能助手时省去大量人工清洗工作。
items.summary_en: MinerU is an open-source tool that automatically converts complex documents like PDFs and Office files into LLM-ready Markdown or JSON, making it easy to feed them into AI workflows. It solves the headache of handling unstructured docs for developers building RAG pipelines or agentic automations, saving tons of manual cleaning effort.

items.title: Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
items.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
items.author: Egonex-AI
items.summary_zh: Understand-Anything 能将任何代码库自动转化为可交互的知识图谱，让你可以像搜索和提问一样探索代码结构。它打破了传统线性阅读代码的模式，通过可视化展示函数、类、模块之间的关系，帮助开发者快速理解大型项目。对于接手历史代码、参与开源贡献或学习新框架的人来说，这个工具极大降低了认知负担，让理解复杂代码变成一场有趣的导航体验。
items.summary_en: Understand-Anything transforms any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph that you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Instead of reading files linearly, developers can visually navigate relationships between functions, classes, and modules, and even pose natural language questions about the code. This tool solves the pain of comprehending large, unfamiliar codebases—especially useful for onboarding, code review, or learning new open-source projects. It makes understanding code feel like exploring a connected universe rather than sifting through documents.

items.title: shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice
items.description: from vibe coding to agentic engineering - practice makes claude perfect
items.author: shanraisshan
items.summary_zh: 这个仓库汇总了使用 Claude Code 的最佳实践，帮助开发者从随性的“Vibe Coding”转向系统化的“智能体工程”，通过不断练习让 AI 编码工具的表现更完美，适合所有希望提升 AI 编程效率和质量的人。
items.summary_en: This collection of best practices for Claude Code guides developers from casual 'vibe coding' to disciplined 'agentic engineering,' emphasizing that practice makes Claude perfect. It provides actionable tips to improve the quality and efficiency of AI-assisted coding, benefiting anyone who wants to move beyond trial-and-error and build reliable software with AI.

items.title: colbymchenry/codegraph
items.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph, auto syncs on code changes, for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
items.author: colbymchenry
items.summary_zh: CodeGraph 是一个预先索引的代码知识图谱工具，能自动同步代码变更，为 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Cursor 等 AI 编程助手提供结构化的上下文信息。开发者再也不用手动整理项目结构，AI 助手能瞬间理解代码库全貌，大幅提升代码生成和调试的准确性。对于依赖 AI 辅助编程的团队和个人，这就像给 AI 装上了一张实时的项目地图。
items.summary_en: CodeGraph is a pre-indexed code knowledge graph that automatically syncs with your code changes, feeding structured context to popular AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and Cursor. Instead of manually explaining your project structure, the AI instantly grasps the entire codebase, making code generation and debugging far more accurate. It's like giving your AI a live, up-to-date map of your project. Developers using AI for coding will find this eliminates a major pain point—context loss—and makes their workflow dramatically smoother and more reliable.

items.title: NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler
items.description: 小红书笔记 | 评论爬虫、抖音视频 | 评论爬虫、快手视频 | 评论爬虫、B 站视频 ｜ 评论爬虫、微博帖子 ｜ 评论爬虫、百度贴吧帖子 ｜ 百度贴吧评论回复爬虫 | 知乎问答文章｜评论爬虫
items.author: NanmiCoder
items.summary_zh: 这是一个多平台社交媒体爬虫工具，支持小红书、抖音、快手、B站、微博、百度贴吧和知乎，能抓取笔记、视频、帖子及评论。对于需要做舆情分析、竞品研究或数据挖掘的人来说，它把散落在各平台的公开内容集中抓取，省去了自己写爬虫的麻烦。
items.summary_en: MediaCrawler is a multi-platform social media scraper covering Xiaohongshu, Douyin, Kuaishou, Bilibili, Weibo, Baidu Tieba, and Zhihu, extracting posts, videos, and comments. It's a goldmine for market researchers, data analysts, and content creators who need public data from China's top platforms without building individual crawlers.

items.title: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
items.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop
items.author: Leonxlnx
items.summary_zh: Taste-Skill 是一个让 AI 拥有“品味”的开源项目，旨在阻止 AI 生成无聊、千篇一律的套话。它通过注入风格偏好和审美标准，让模型输出更具个性与创意。对于厌倦了 AI 那种“官方腔”和模板化回复的内容创作者、营销人员或任何使用生成式 AI 的用户，这个项目能解放你的生产力，让 AI 的产出真正有灵魂、有风格。
items.summary_en: Taste-Skill is an open-source project that gives your AI genuine taste, preventing it from churning out boring, generic slop. By injecting style preferences and aesthetic standards, it pushes models to produce more creative and distinctive outputs. For content creators, marketers, and anyone tired of AI's default “corporate blandness,” this project is a breath of fresh air. It transforms AI from a repetitive template machine into a collaborator with actual voice and flair, making every generated piece feel human and intentional.

items.title: 突发：苹果深夜大涨价，黄牛疯狂囤货，iPhone 18危险了
items.summary_zh: 苹果深夜突然大幅上调 iPad 和 Mac 产品价格，引发黄牛疯狂囤货，而下一代 iPhone 18 的定价策略也因此蒙上阴影。市场担心苹果为了维持利润将全线提价，消费者购买成本上升，供应链和渠道商也在密切关注后续的供需变化。
items.summary_en: Apple surprised everyone with a late-night price hike on iPads and Macs, triggering scalpers to stockpile devices aggressively. The move raises concerns that the upcoming iPhone 18 could also see a significant price increase, squeezing consumers and rattling the supply chain. Analysts warn this might be a strategy to protect margins amid rising component costs.

items.title: 8点1氪丨苹果宣布上调iPad及Mac价格；黄仁勋计划把50%或更多现金流返还股东；OpenAI发布首款AI芯片
items.summary_zh: 今天的 8 点 1 氪汇总了三件大事：苹果宣布上调 iPad 和 Mac 售价，影响用户购机预算；英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋计划将 50% 或更多现金流返还股东，显示公司盈利能力强劲；OpenAI 发布首款自研 AI 芯片，标志着其开始摆脱对第三方硬件的依赖。
items.summary_en: Today's 8pm1氪 roundup covers three big stories: Apple raises iPad and Mac prices, hitting consumers' wallets; Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang plans to return half or more of free cash flow to shareholders, underscoring the company's financial strength; and OpenAI launches its first in-house AI chip, signaling a move away from relying on third-party hardware.

items.title: 2026，10000个中国版 Codex 大乱斗
items.summary_zh: 到 2026 年，中国可能出现一万个类似 GitHub Copilot 的 AI 代码生成工具（Codex 类产品）激烈竞争。这意味着开发者将拥有丰富选择，但同时也面临平台碎片化和质量参差不齐的挑战。市场将从早期的几家巨头争夺变成百家争鸣，最终可能只有少数产品能脱颖而出。
items.summary_en: By 2026, China's AI coding tool market is expected to explode with 10,000 different 'Codex-like' products competing for developers' attention. While this abundance gives coders plenty of choices, it also brings fragmentation and quality inconsistency. The landscape will shift from a few major players to a chaotic battlefield, and only the most reliable tools will survive.

items.title: 俞浩不疯了，现身新闻联播，追觅200个事业部合成4个
items.summary_zh: 追觅科技创始人俞浩日前亮相新闻联播，同时公司进行重大组织变革，将原先多达200个事业部精简为4个核心板块。这一举措标志着追觅从早期激进扩张转向聚焦主业，旨在提升运营效率和资源集中度。俞浩的“不疯”表态与组织瘦身，反映出科技公司面对市场环境变化时更务实的战略调整，对其他企业的组织管理具有借鉴意义。
items.summary_en: Yu Hao, founder of Dreame Technology, recently appeared on China's national news broadcast. Concurrently, the company announced a major organizational restructuring, slashing its 200 business units down to just four core divisions. This move signals a shift from aggressive expansion to a more focused strategy aimed at improving operational efficiency and resource concentration. Yu's 'no longer crazy' stance and the leaner structure reflect a pragmatic adjustment by tech companies facing market changes, offering lessons for corporate governance.

items.title: 中产最烧钱的户外运动：种地
items.summary_zh: 近年来越来越多的城市中产开始热衷“种地”这项户外活动，他们或租用郊区菜园，或购买智能种植设备，花费甚至超过传统高端运动。这种“回归田园”的生活方式背后，既有对自然和健康的追求，也反映出焦虑的中产通过亲手劳作获得掌控感和精神疗愈。种地不仅是一种消费升级，更成为一种新型社交货币和身份标识。
items.summary_en: In recent years, more and more urban middle-class Chinese have taken up 'farming' as an outdoor activity, renting suburban plots or buying smart gardening gear—spending even more than on traditional high-end sports. This pastoral trend reflects a pursuit of nature and health, as well as anxious middle-class individuals seeking a sense of control and mental healing through manual labor. Farming has evolved beyond consumption into a new form of social currency and identity marker.

items.title: Java 近期新闻：A2A Java SDK 1.0、Jakarta EE 12、JNoSQL、GraalVM、Micrometer、OpenXava、Gradle
items.summary_zh: Java生态近期迎来多项重要更新：A2A Java SDK 1.0发布，为Agent间通信提供标准化工具；Jakarta EE 12带来企业级开发新特性；JNoSQL简化NoSQL数据库集成；GraalVM提升性能与多语言支持；Micrometer增强可观测性；OpenXava助力快速开发业务应用；Gradle改进构建速度。这些更新共同推动了Java在云原生和AI时代的竞争力。
items.summary_en: The Java ecosystem recently saw several major updates: A2A Java SDK 1.0 provides standardized agent-to-agent communication; Jakarta EE 12 introduces new enterprise features; JNoSQL simplifies NoSQL integration; GraalVM boosts performance and polyglot capabilities; Micrometer enhances observability; OpenXava accelerates business application development; and Gradle improves build speeds. Together, these advancements bolster Java's competitiveness in the cloud-native and AI era.

items.title: AI可以用任何手段、写任何东西，但你得是个“中年老登”
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，尽管AI在写作和创作上已无所不能，但真正能驾驭AI产出高质量内容的，往往是那些经验丰富、阅历深厚的“中年老登”。他们凭借对行业、人性和语境的深刻理解，能够精准把控AI的输出方向和质量。这一观点挑战了“AI取代人类创作者”的简单论调，强调独特的人生经验才是AI时代不可替代的核心竞争力。
items.summary_en: The article argues that while AI can write anything using any means, it's often the experienced 'middle-aged veterans' who truly harness AI to produce high-quality content. With deep understanding of industries, human nature, and context, they can precisely guide AI's output. This challenges the simplistic notion that AI will replace human creators, emphasizing that unique life experience remains an irreplaceable core competency in the AI era.

items.title: 这家Agent 公司从 Claude 切到 DeepSeek v4：一年省下数百万美元，迁移工作量却是预期的 100 倍
items.summary_zh: 一家AI Agent公司将从Claude模型迁移至DeepSeek v4，每年可节省数百万美元成本，但迁移工作量远超预期，达到原先估计的100倍。这一案例揭示了AI模型迁移背后的巨大隐性成本，包括兼容性调试、性能调优和业务逻辑重构等。对于计划切换AI模型的企业而言，这无异于一记警钟：成本节约固然诱人，但必须充分评估迁移的复杂性和风险。
items.summary_en: An AI agent company migrated from Claude to DeepSeek v4, saving millions of dollars annually—but the migration effort turned out to be 100 times greater than expected. This case highlights the enormous hidden costs of switching AI models, including compatibility debugging, performance tuning, and business logic refactoring. For enterprises planning model migration, it serves as a cautionary tale: while cost savings are tempting, one must fully assess the complexity and risks involved.

items.title: 上海交通大学教授冷静文确认出席AICon上海站，分享Token经济爆发下从评测到调度的全链路优化供给
items.summary_zh: 上海交通大学教授冷静文确认出席AICon上海站，并计划分享在Token经济爆发背景下，从模型评测到任务调度的全链路优化供给方案。这一分享旨在帮助企业和开发者解决当前AI应用中Token消耗激增带来的成本与效率问题，为大规模AI基础设施的落地提供实用思路。对于关注AI工程化与资源优化的技术团队而言，这次演讲将带来前沿的产学研视角。
items.summary_en: Professor Leng Jingwen from Shanghai Jiao Tong University will attend AICon Shanghai to share a full-chain optimization approach from model evaluation to task scheduling in the era of token economy explosion. His talk addresses the soaring token consumption and cost challenges faced by AI applications, offering practical strategies for large-scale AI infrastructure deployment. This is particularly valuable for engineering teams seeking to balance performance and resource efficiency in production environments.

items.title: 三家公司一周内出手，编码 Agent 进入团队基础设施时代
items.summary_zh: 短短一周内，三家科技公司接连发布了编码Agent产品，标志着这类工具已从个人辅助角色正式进入团队基础设施时代。这些Agent能够自动生成代码、修复bug、参与代码审查，并与CI/CD流水线深度集成，从而显著提升团队的开发效率和代码质量。对于技术管理者而言，这不仅是工具升级，更意味着开发流程和组织协作方式的重大变革。
items.summary_en: Within a single week, three tech companies launched coding agent products, marking these tools' transition from personal assistants to team-level infrastructure. These agents can auto-generate code, fix bugs, participate in code reviews, and integrate deeply with CI/CD pipelines, significantly boosting team productivity and code quality. For engineering managers, this represents not just a tool upgrade but a fundamental shift in development workflows and team collaboration.

items.title: PostgreSQL 19 Beta 版引入 SQL 图查询和并发表重新打包功能
items.summary_zh: PostgreSQL 19 Beta版引入了两个重要功能：原生SQL图查询支持和并发表重新打包。图查询让开发者能更高效地处理复杂关系数据，而并发表重新打包则优化了存储空间和查询性能，尤其在并发写操作频繁的场景下效果显著。这些更新进一步扩展了PostgreSQL在关系数据库之外的能力，使其更适合现代数据密集型应用，对数据架构师和DBA来说是一大利好。
items.summary_en: PostgreSQL 19 Beta introduces two major features: native SQL graph queries and concurrent table repacking. Graph queries enable efficient handling of complex relational data, while concurrent repacking optimizes storage and query performance under heavy write workloads. These enhancements extend PostgreSQL beyond traditional relational use cases, making it more suitable for modern data-intensive applications. Database architects and DBAs will benefit from improved flexibility and maintenance capabilities.

items.title: Claude Code 工程一号位亲自给 Agent 热潮降温：狂烧 Token 时代已过，现在该算ROI了
items.summary_zh: Claude Code的工程一号位近日公开降温Agent热潮，指出过去那种狂烧Token来解决问题的时代已经过去，现在应该认真计算投入产出比（ROI）。他呼吁行业回归理性，强调Agent的效果不能只看演示指标，而要关注实际业务价值，尤其是单位Token带来的收入或效率提升。这对正在疯狂追逐Agent的公司而言是一剂清醒剂，提醒他们不要陷入技术炫技而忽略了商业模式。
items.summary_en: The engineering lead of Claude Code publicly cooled down the AI agent hype, declaring that the era of burning tokens recklessly is over and it's time to calculate ROI. He urged the industry to focus on practical business value rather than flashy demos, stressing that the real metric is revenue or efficiency gain per token. This serves as a reality check for companies chasing agent technologies, reminding them not to neglect business models while pursuing technical sophistication.

items.title: 狂烧 Token 却赚不到钱？这家清华系 AI Infra 独角兽已破解算力成本难题
items.summary_zh: 一家清华系的AI基础设施独角兽宣称已破解算力成本难题，直击当前AI创业公司“狂烧Token却赚不到钱”的痛点。该方案通过智能调度、模型压缩和资源复用等技术，在不影响性能的前提下大幅降低Token消耗和计算成本，从而让AI应用真正实现盈利。对于预算有限但又想快速落地大模型能力的团队来说，这无疑是一个及时且重要的突破。
items.summary_en: A Tsinghua-incubated AI infrastructure unicorn claims to have solved the computing cost puzzle, addressing the pain point of companies burning tokens without making money. Their solution uses intelligent scheduling, model compression, and resource reuse to drastically reduce token consumption and compute costs without sacrificing performance. This breakthrough is timely for budget-constrained teams that need to deploy large models profitably, potentially reshaping the economics of AI applications.

items.title: GitHub 推出 Copilot 桌面应用，支持并行 Agent 开发工作流
items.summary_zh: GitHub 推出了全新的 Copilot 桌面应用，让开发者可以像使用本地 IDE 一样与 AI 助手交互。最引人注目的是它支持多个 Agent 并行工作，能同时处理不同的编程任务，比如一个 Agent 在写测试代码，另一个在重构主逻辑。这种并行协作模式大大提升了开发效率，尤其适合复杂项目中的多线程调试和快速迭代。对于需要频繁切换上下文的团队来说，这无疑是一个重磅利好。
items.summary_en: GitHub launched a native desktop app for Copilot that brings AI pair programming directly to users' local environments. The standout feature is support for parallel agent workflows, allowing multiple AI instances to handle different tasks simultaneously—one writing tests while another refactors core logic. This mirrors the way human teams work together, boosting productivity for complex projects. Developers juggling multiple contexts will find this particularly useful, as it reduces wait times and keeps the coding flow uninterrupted. It's a significant step toward making AI an integral, agile part of the development process.

items.title: AI 编程代理拥有了自己的 Stack Overflow
items.summary_zh: 最近出现了一个专门为 AI 编程代理打造的问答社区，类似于 Stack Overflow 但面向的是机器而不是人类。代理们可以在上面发布问题、分享代码片段和调试经历，相互学习最佳实践。这解决了当前 AI 编程中一个关键痛点：模型在遇到陌生错误时往往无法求助，而有了这个平台，它们就能像人类开发者一样查阅历史方案，提升代码生成的准确性和鲁棒性。对于依赖 AI 辅助编程的团队来说，这可能会带来质的飞跃。
items.summary_en: A new Stack Overflow-like platform has emerged exclusively for AI coding agents. Here, agents can post questions, share code snippets, and even describe debugging journeys, learning from each other's best practices. This addresses a major pain point: when an AI model encounters an unfamiliar error, it previously had no way to seek help. Now, agents can consult a repository of past solutions, much like human developers do. The result is more robust code generation and faster problem resolution. For teams heavily reliant on AI-assisted development, this could dramatically improve reliability and accelerate learning curves.

items.title: Steam Machine launches today
items.author: theschwa
items.summary_zh: Valve今日正式发布了Steam Machine，这是一款专为客厅游戏场景设计的游戏主机，运行SteamOS系统。它允许玩家在电视上流畅运行PC游戏，并支持流式传输和多种控制器。此次发布标志着Valve试图打破主机市场格局，将PC游戏的开放生态带入客厅。对于游戏玩家而言，这意味着更丰富的游戏选择、更低的硬件门槛，以及跨平台存档和社交功能的便利。
items.summary_en: Valve today officially launched the Steam Machine, a gaming console designed for the living room running SteamOS. It lets players smoothly play PC games on TV, supports streaming and various controllers. This launch marks Valve's attempt to disrupt the console market by bringing the open ecosystem of PC gaming into the living room. For gamers, it means more game choices, lower hardware barriers, and the convenience of cross-platform saves and social features.

items.title: An entire Herculaneum scroll has been read for the first time
items.author: verditelabs
items.summary_zh: 科学家们首次完整地阅读了一卷被维苏威火山喷发碳化的赫库兰尼姆古卷，这卷在公元79年埋藏至今的莎草纸文献通过先进成像技术和人工智能得到了成功解读。团队利用高分辨率扫描和机器学习模型破译了被碳化的文字，揭示了古希腊哲学和文学的新内容。这项突破不仅为历史研究打开了一扇通往古代世界的新窗户，也验证了非侵入式技术对脆弱文物的保护价值。对于考古学家、古典学者以及所有对文明传承感兴趣的人来说，这是一个激动人心的里程碑。
items.summary_en: For the first time, researchers have fully read a Herculaneum scroll that was carbonized by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius in 79 AD. Using advanced X-ray imaging and machine learning, they deciphered the charred papyrus, unearthing new passages of ancient Greek philosophy and literature. This achievement solves a centuries-old puzzle—these scrolls were long considered too fragile to unroll. The breakthrough not only enriches our understanding of antiquity but also demonstrates a powerful, non-invasive method for studying other delicate artifacts. Archaeologists, classicists, and anyone fascinated by lost knowledge will find this a monumental leap forward.

items.title: Deno Desktop
items.author: GeneralMaximus
items.summary_zh: Deno Desktop是一个新工具，允许开发者使用Deno运行时直接构建跨平台的桌面应用程序。它结合了Web技术和Deno的现代特性，如TypeScript原生支持、安全权限模型和内置工具链，使得桌面应用开发变得更加简单高效。对于那些希望用JavaScript或TypeScript快速开发桌面应用而又不想依赖Electron的开发者来说，这是一个轻量级的替代方案，同时保持了Deno的安全性和性能优势。
items.summary_en: Deno Desktop is a new tool that lets developers build cross-platform desktop applications directly using the Deno runtime. It combines web technologies with Deno's modern features such as native TypeScript support, a security permission model, and a built-in toolchain, making desktop app development simpler and more efficient. For developers who want to quickly create desktop apps with JavaScript or TypeScript without relying on Electron, this is a lightweight alternative that maintains Deno's security and performance advantages.

items.title: We’re making Bunny DNS free
items.author: dabinat
items.summary_zh: Bunny DNS 宣布完全免费，这是一家提供内容分发网络和域名解析服务的公司。以往需要付费才能享用的专业级 DNS 解析和加速功能，现在个人开发者和小型网站都可以零成本使用。这项举措大幅降低了网络基础设施的门槛，尤其适合那些想要提升网站性能但预算有限的用户。更重要的是，免费套餐并不限制功能，这意味着任何规模的站点都能获得企业级的稳定性和速度，对独立开发者和小团队来说是个实实在在的福音。
items.summary_en: Bunny DNS has announced that its DNS services are now completely free. Previously a paid offering, this move removes the cost barrier for professional-grade DNS resolution and CDN acceleration, making it accessible to individual developers and small websites. The free tier includes full features without limitations, allowing any site to benefit from enterprise-level stability and speed. This is a significant shift for budget-constrained users who need reliable infrastructure, and it challenges the market by showing that premium performance doesn't have to come with a price tag.

items.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
items.author: jamdesk
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 发布了首款自研定制芯片，由 Broadcom 负责制造。这一举动标志着 OpenAI 开始减少对 Nvidia 等外部供应商的依赖，转向为自家 AI 模型量身定制硬件。新芯片针对训练和推理两大环节进行了优化，有望在提升性能的同时显著降低成本和能耗。对于整个AI行业来说，这意味着大模型训练的门槛可能进一步下降，更多创新应用将得以实现。OpenAI 的这一战略也加速了科技巨头自研芯片的竞赛。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has revealed its first custom chip, built in collaboration with Broadcom. This move marks a shift away from relying on Nvidia and other suppliers, as OpenAI designs silicon specifically tailored for its AI workloads. The chip is optimized for both training and inference, promising higher performance with lower cost and energy consumption. For the AI industry, this could make large model development more accessible and spur further innovation. It also signals an intensifying race among tech giants to develop proprietary hardware, reducing dependence on third-party vendors and enabling tighter integration between software and hardware.

items.title: 别再裸用 Claude Code 了！32 个亲测Skills + 8 个 MCP，开发效率直接拉满！
items.description: 别再裸用 Claude Code 了！32 个亲测技能 + 8 个 MCP 服务器，开发效率直接拉满！ 先晒一下我装完的效果（见下图），所有技能均实测可用。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者亲测了32个Claude Code实用技能和8个MCP服务器，整理出一套完整的效率提升方案。这些技能覆盖代码补全、重构、调试等关键环节，配合MCP服务器实现任务自动化，让AI编程助手从玩具变成真正的生产力工具。文章强调所有技能均已真实可用，不是理论堆砌，适合所有使用Claude Code的开发者直接上手。
items.summary_en: A developer tested 32 practical Claude Code skills and 8 MCP servers, compiling a comprehensive guide to boost coding efficiency. These skills cover code completion, refactoring, and debugging, while the MCP servers automate repetitive tasks, transforming Claude Code from a gimmick into a real productivity tool. The author emphasizes that all tips have been verified in practice, making this resource valuable for any developer looking to get the most out of their AI coding assistant.

items.title: Anthropic says Alibaba illicitly extracted Claude AI model capabilities
items.author: htrp
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 公开指控阿里巴巴通过非正当手段获取了其 Claude 大语言模型的关键能力。据称，阿里巴巴利用 API 调用和反向工程技术，系统性地模拟并复制了 Claude 的推理逻辑和对话行为。这一事件引发了关于 AI 模型知识产权保护和商业秘密泄露的广泛讨论。对于整个行业而言，它敲响了警钟：随着模型价值的飙升，如何防止技术被盗用将成为各家公司必须面对的严峻挑战。这也会影响未来 API 访问策略和模型部署方式。
items.summary_en: Anthropic has publicly accused Alibaba of illicitly extracting capabilities from its Claude AI model through systematic API queries and reverse engineering to replicate the model's reasoning and conversational behavior. This raises serious concerns about intellectual property theft in the AI industry. As models become more valuable, the line between legitimate research and corporate espionage blurs. The accusation highlights the urgent need for stronger safeguards—both technical and legal—to protect proprietary AI systems. For developers and companies relying on API access, this case could reshape how model owners design their interfaces and enforce usage policies in the future.

items.title: Om Malik has died
items.author: minimaxir
items.summary_zh: 知名科技博主、硅谷早期互联网的深刻观察者 Om Malik 去世，享年 56 岁。他因创办科技博客 GigaOM 而闻名，长期撰写关于宽带、风险投资和初创生态的深度文章。他的笔触既有技术洞察又充满人文关怀，影响了整整一代科技写作者和创业者。他的离世让科技界感到惋惜，许多人怀念他那些冷静而富有远见的分析。在他留下的文字中，我们依然能感受到他对创新和社区的热忱，这份精神将继续激励后来者。
items.summary_en: Om Malik, the renowned tech blogger and a sharp observer of the early internet era, has passed away at 56. He founded GigaOM, a blog that became a must-read for its deep dives into broadband, venture capital, and startup culture. Malik's writing was distinctive—technically astute yet deeply human, often questioning the impact of technology on society. He mentored a generation of writers and entrepreneurs with his calm, insightful analyses. The tech community mourns his loss, remembering his warmth and vision. His legacy lives on through his articles, which continue to inspire thoughtful discourse about innovation and community.

items.title: Fired by Google for creating the Google workspace CLI
items.author: justinwp
items.summary_zh: 一位谷歌员工因开发了非官方的 Google Workspace 命令行工具而被公司解雇。他创建的 CLI 工具能通过终端直接管理 Google 工作区，极大提升了效率，但可能违反了谷歌对自动化访问的严格规定。这一事件在技术社区引发热议，很多人认为开发者的创造性贡献不应被如此严厉惩罚。它暴露了大公司在拥抱开放与维护安全之间存在的矛盾，同时也提醒第三方工具开发者要仔细阅读服务条款，否则可能面临职业风险。
items.summary_en: A Google engineer was fired for creating an unofficial command-line interface for Google Workspace that allowed efficient management through the terminal. While the tool aimed to improve productivity, it likely violated Google's strict policies on automated access and API usage. The incident has sparked debate in the tech community about corporate overreach and developer rights. Many argue that the engineer's innovation should have been welcomed rather than punished. This case serves as a cautionary tale about the risks of building third-party tools without explicit approval, especially inside large companies with rigid security rules.

items.title: FUTO Swipe – A new swipe typing model
items.author: futohq
items.summary_zh: FUTO 推出了一款全新的滑动输入法模型，名为 FUTO Swipe。与目前主流的滑行输入技术不同，这个模型基于开源算法，号称能提供更高的准确率和更自然的打字体验。它尤其适合在移动设备上单手操作，用户只需在键盘上连续滑动手指即可快速输入单词。对于经常在手机上打字的人来说，这个模型有望替代传统点击输入或已有的滑行方案，而且开源特性让开发者可以根据自己的需求进行定制和优化。
items.summary_en: FUTO Swipe is a new open source swipe typing model designed for mobile devices. Unlike existing swipe input methods, it promises higher accuracy and a more natural feel by using a novel algorithm. The model allows users to glide their finger across the keyboard to form words quickly, making one-handed typing more efficient. For heavy mobile typists, it could replace traditional tap input or other swipe solutions. Being open source, it invites developers to customize and improve the technology. This project addresses the long-standing problem of frustrating autocorrect errors and limited gesture recognition in current keyboards.

items.title: Show HN: I made Google Trends for Hacker News by indexing 18 years of comments
items.author: ytkimirti
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者将 Hacker News 过去 18 年的评论数据全部索引，打造了一个类似 Google Trends 的趋势分析工具。你只需输入关键词，就能看到这个话题在 HN 社区中的讨论热度随时间如何变化。这对于内容创作者、产品经理和研究人员来说非常有用，可以帮助他们快速感知技术社区的关注点变迁。
items.summary_en: A developer indexed all Hacker News comments from the past 18 years to build a Google Trends-like tool for the community. You simply enter a keyword and instantly see how discussion popularity has shifted over time. This is invaluable for content creators, product managers, and researchers who want to track the ebb and flow of tech community interests.

items.title: 全面封禁 Cursor！又一家大厂出手了
items.description: 最近，有网友爆料称：快手的研发线发布通知，收紧了对第三方编程软件的使用权限。 不少同学发现，只要在自己办公电脑上点开 Cursor，就直接闪退，压根儿用不了。
items.summary_zh: 有网友爆料快手研发线发布通知，收紧第三方编程软件权限，员工电脑上打开Cursor就会闪退。这标志着又一家大型互联网公司正式封禁AI编程工具Cursor，反映出企业对代码安全和数据隐私的担忧。对于依赖Cursor提升效率的开发者来说，这一趋势可能迫使他们在工具选型和企业合规之间做出权衡。
items.summary_en: A tipster revealed that Kuaishou’s R&D department issued a notice tightening permissions on third-party programming software, causing Cursor to crash immediately when opened on work computers. This marks another major tech company officially banning the AI coding tool, reflecting growing concerns about code security and data privacy. For developers who rely on Cursor for efficiency, this trend may force a trade-off between tool preference and corporate compliance.

items.title: Bluerails Discovery
items.description: The rails AI agents use to find and pay you
items.summary_zh: Bluerails Discovery 是一个为AI代理设计的支付轨道，让智能体能够自主发现用户并直接支付报酬。它通过标准化接口连接AI系统和支付平台，解决了AI代理无法独立完成交易的问题。对于使用AI自动化工作流的开发者、自由职业者和内容创作者来说，这意味着无需人工干预即可实现即时结算，特别适合按需付费或奖励型场景。
items.summary_en: Bluerails Discovery creates a payment rail specifically for AI agents, enabling them to autonomously find and pay users based on predefined rules. By bridging the gap between intelligent systems and financial transactions, it solves the fundamental problem of AI agents lacking independent payment capabilities. Developers running automated workflows, freelancers, and content creators benefit from this frictionless, instant settlement mechanism, which is ideal for pay-per-use models, reward systems, or any scenario requiring seamless machine-to-human compensation.

items.title: Tencent EdgeOne Makers
items.description: Ship AI agents like web apps, in minutes.
items.summary_zh: 腾讯 EdgeOne Makers 是一个低代码平台，让开发者像部署网页应用一样快速发布AI代理。它整合了腾讯边缘计算网络，提供自动缩放、安全防护和API管理功能。对于想缩短AI产品上市时间的中小团队而言，该工具省去了复杂的运维环节，几分钟内就能将原型变为在线服务。
items.summary_en: Tencent EdgeOne Makers is a low-code platform that treats AI agents like web apps, allowing developers to ship them in minutes with built-in edge computing, auto-scaling, and security. By abstracting infrastructure complexity, it empowers small teams to bypass DevOps headaches and focus on agent logic. The result is accelerated deployment cycles for prototypes and production-ready services, particularly valuable for startups and businesses needing rapid iteration on conversational AI or automation tools.

items.title: Propane
items.description: Automatic customer context for product teams and agents
items.summary_zh: Propane 是一款自动收集客户上下文的工具，为产品团队和AI代理提供即时的用户背景信息。它从聊天记录、工单、CRM等多个来源整合数据，在交互时自动推送相关摘要。产品经理和客服代理不再需要手动翻阅历史记录，可以更快理解客户需求，提升响应质量。
items.summary_en: Propane automatically aggregates customer context from various data sources—conversations, support tickets, CRM entries—and surfaces relevant summaries to product teams and AI agents at the moment of interaction. This eliminates the tedious task of manually searching for background information. Product managers gain instant insight into user pain points, while customer support agents resolve issues faster with full context, making it a productivity booster for any team that handles user-facing communication.

items.title: BrowserAct
items.description: Web browser automation for AI agents
items.summary_zh: BrowserAct 是一款专为 AI 代理打造的浏览器自动化工具。它让 AI 能够像人类一样操作浏览器，完成填写表单、抓取数据等网页任务。这大大简化了 AI 与真实网页交互的复杂度，特别适合需要构建自动化工作流的开发者和企业。
items.summary_en: BrowserAct is a web browser automation tool designed specifically for AI agents. It enables AI to interact with web pages just like a human, handling tasks such as filling forms and scraping data. This dramatically simplifies the complexity of AI-to-web interaction, making it ideal for developers and businesses building automated workflows.

items.title: Oxlo.ai
items.description: Scale across AI models without scaling your bill
items.summary_zh: Oxlo.ai 解决了一个实际痛点：企业想调用多个 AI 模型以获取最佳效果，但成本容易失控。Oxlo 允许你在不同模型之间智能路由请求，从而在不增加账单的前提下实现横向扩展。这对于需要频繁切换模型或进行大规模推理的团队来说，无疑是省钱利器。
items.summary_en: Oxlo.ai addresses a real pain point: companies want to use multiple AI models to get the best results, but costs can quickly spiral. Oxlo smartly routes requests across different models, enabling you to scale horizontally without scaling your bill. This is a huge cost-saver for teams that frequently switch models or conduct large-scale inference.

items.title: OpenArt Director
items.description: Direct cinematic videos through chat
items.summary_zh: OpenArt Director 是一款通过自然语言聊天引导生成电影级视频的工具。用户只需描述场景、镜头和情绪，AI就能逐步构建出连贯的影片。它解决了传统视频制作需要专业软件和剪辑技能的问题，适合营销人员、故事创作者和设计师快速产出高质感视觉内容。
items.summary_en: OpenArt Director lets users direct cinematic videos simply by chatting. Describe a scene, camera movement, or mood, and the AI translates those instructions into a coherent film sequence. It democratizes video production by removing the need for complex editing software or cinematography knowledge. Marketers can quickly produce promotional clips, storytellers can visualize narratives, and designers can iterate on visual concepts—all through natural conversation, making professional-looking video creation accessible to everyone.

items.title: Zaro
items.description: Build agents & apps on top of your context with one prompt.
items.summary_zh: Zaro 提出了一种极简的构建方式：只需一个提示，就能围绕你自己的上下文构建 AI 代理或应用。无需繁琐的配置或复杂的工作流编排。这对于希望快速验证想法或为特定数据场景定制 AI 工具的非技术用户和开发者来说，门槛极低。
items.summary_en: Zaro offers a radically simple building approach: with just one prompt, you can create AI agents or applications grounded in your own context. No tedious configuration or complex workflow orchestration is needed. This dramatically lowers the barrier for non-technical users and developers who want to quickly prototype ideas or tailor AI tools to their specific data scenarios.

items.title: Cotypist
items.description: Local AI Autocomplete in your voice, anywhere on your Mac
items.summary_zh: Cotypist 是一款运行在 Mac 上的本地 AI 自动补全工具，它可以学习用户的写作风格，在任意输入框中提供符合个人语气的补全建议。由于所有数据处理都在本地完成，用户的隐私得到了充分保护。这个工具特别适合那些需要频繁写作、同时又希望保持个人风格且不想依赖云端服务的用户，它解决了现有 AI 写作助手风格不匹配和隐私顾虑的问题。
items.summary_en: Cotypist is a local AI autocomplete tool for Mac that learns your writing voice and offers personalized suggestions in any input field. Because it runs entirely on your machine, your data stays private. This is ideal for writers, developers, and anyone who types a lot and wants consistent, on-brand completion without relying on cloud services. It tackles the common pain points of generic AI suggestions and privacy concerns.

items.title: Latitude
items.description: Fix what's breaking in your AI agent
items.summary_zh: Latitude 是一个专门用来监控和调试 AI 代理（agent）的工具，它能够自动检测代理运行中的异常行为并帮助开发者迅速定位问题根源。随着企业越来越多地依赖 AI 代理处理关键任务，Latitude 提供了一种更可靠的运维方式。任何正在构建或运营 AI 代理的团队都能从中受益，因为它显著降低了生产环境中的调试难度和故障恢复时间。
items.summary_en: Latitude is a monitoring and debugging tool built specifically for AI agents. It automatically detects anomalies in agent behavior and helps developers pinpoint the root cause of issues quickly. As companies rely more on AI agents for critical operations, Latitude offers a more reliable way to maintain them. Any team building or running AI agents will benefit from this tool, as it reduces debugging effort and downtime in production.

items.title: Thumbmagic
items.description: AI thumbnail generator trained on top-performing thumbnails
items.summary_zh: Thumbmagic 是一个基于顶尖表现缩略图训练出的 AI 生成器，只需输入视频标题或内容梗概，它就能自动生成高点击率的封面图。对于视频创作者和营销人员来说，这个工具能够大幅提升内容的吸引力并节省设计时间。它解决了手动设计缩略图效果不确定、耗时费力的问题，让每个视频都有更大机会获得曝光。
items.summary_en: Thumbmagic is an AI thumbnail generator trained on top-performing thumbnails. You simply provide the video title or a brief description, and it produces click-worthy covers automatically. For content creators and marketers, this tool boosts video engagement and saves hours of design work. It addresses the uncertainty and time cost of manual thumbnail creation, giving every video a better chance to stand out.

items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

items.title: 写给年轻程序员的几点建议-2
items.description: 现在互联网红利已经消失了，深知年轻程序员的不易，下面就浅薄地谈几点建议。中国人口基数比较大，要培养自己的 商业嗅觉。你能卖爆一个商品，就能获得巨大的财富。微信公众号如果能写出 几万 浏览量的文章，就有
items.summary_zh: 作者针对互联网红利消退的现状，向年轻程序员提出培养商业嗅觉和写作能力的建议。他认为在中国庞大的人口基数下，能卖爆一个商品或写出高阅读量的公众号文章就能获得巨大财富。文章强调技术之外的市场认知和内容表达能力同样重要，适合处于职业早期的程序员思考如何拓宽收入来源。
items.summary_en: The author offers advice for young programmers in the post-internet-bonus era, emphasizing the need to develop business acumen and writing skills. Given China's huge population, successfully selling a product or writing a viral WeChat article can bring significant wealth. The article argues that market insight and content communication are as crucial as technical skills, making it relevant for early-career programmers looking to diversify their income streams.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 又是梁文锋，有点猛啊。
items.description: 又是梁文锋 前几天一年一度的高考不是刚落下帷幕嘛。 说巧不巧，正好这两天我在小绿书上好几次刷到有关一位国内 AI 圈顶级大佬当年的高考故事。 没错，这位大佬正是 DeepSeeek 的创始人：梁文锋。
items.summary_zh: 高考刚结束，网上又翻出了DeepSeek创始人梁文锋当年的高考故事。这位AI圈的顶级大佬，当年以优异成绩考入名校，如今带领DeepSeek在人工智能领域掀起波澜。他的经历不仅激励着无数考生，也让人看到技术人才如何从校园走向行业巅峰。梁文锋的故事再次证明，真正的创新往往源自深厚的学术积累和持续的坚持。
items.summary_en: Just as the annual college entrance exam wrapped up, stories about Liang Wenfeng, the founder of DeepSeek, resurfaced online. Back in the day, he achieved top scores on the gaokao and entered a prestigious university. Now, as a leading figure in the AI world, he is making waves with DeepSeek. His journey inspires students and professionals alike, showcasing how solid academic foundations and relentless persistence can drive groundbreaking innovation in the tech industry.

items.title: 苦撑13年，创始人离职出走，拉勾终究还是倒下了…
items.description: 拉勾破产了。 这个消息相信不少同学前几天都刷到了，当时我刚看到这个消息时，也是一声叹息。 为什么我会如此唏嘘呢？ 原因很简单。 我清晰地记得我本科毕业前后那会，拉勾开始火起来的，作为拉勾早期的用户，我
items.summary_zh: 拉勾网宣布破产，这家曾经火遍招聘行业的平台最终没能撑过第十三个年头。创始人早已离职，团队几经挣扎仍无力回天。回想起大学刚毕业时，拉勾曾是许多年轻人找工作的第一站，如今它的倒下不禁让人唏嘘。这背后既是市场竞争的残酷，也折射出招聘行业在移动互联网时代的剧烈洗牌。
items.summary_en: Lagou, a once-popular recruitment platform in China, has finally filed for bankruptcy after struggling for 13 years. Its founder left the company long ago, and despite multiple attempts to turn things around, the platform couldn't survive the brutal competition and shifting landscape of the recruitment industry. For many young graduates, Lagou was the go-to place to find their first job, making its collapse a poignant reminder of how quickly the internet market can leave once-thriving companies behind.

items.title: 最近公司烧token比招员工还贵，老板干懵了...
items.description: 如题。 这真的没在开玩笑。 这也是最近不少公司，在大力、甚至全面拥抱 AI 之后所发出的切实吐槽。 一个月前，Uber 的 CTO 曾对外透露，公司自部署 CC 以来，内部有超 9 成的工程师在高频率
items.summary_zh: 这不是段子，是真实发生在许多公司里的窘境。随着全面拥抱AI，员工高频调用大模型API，公司的token消耗费用竟然超过了招聘新员工的成本。Uber的CTO曾透露，内部有超过九成的工程师在频繁使用AI服务。老板们面对账单直呼头疼：本来是降本增效的AI，怎么成了新的烧钱黑洞？
items.summary_en: This isn't a joke—it's a real dilemma many companies are facing. After wholeheartedly adopting AI, their token usage costs have actually surpassed the expense of hiring new employees. Uber's CTO revealed that over 90% of their engineers are using AI services heavily. Bosses are staring at the bills in shock: the technology that was supposed to reduce costs and boost efficiency has instead become a new money-burning black hole.

items.title: 面试官坏笑：“你用 AI 编程一年了，怎么保证 Claude Code 写出来的代码是对的？”我：“直接上 Claude Fable 5 啊！”
items.description: 一年 Claude Code 编程经验总结，6 个实战 Case 展示 CLAUDE.md、Skill、Hook、Sub-agent 等核心技巧，附 Fable 5 模型体验。
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇深入分享使用 Claude Code 编程一年经验的实战文章。作者通过 6 个真实案例，详细展示了 CLAUDE.md、Skill、Hook、Sub-agent 等核心技巧，并附带了 Claude Fable 5 模型的体验。文章既幽默又实在，对长期依赖 AI 辅助编程的开发者很有启发。
items.summary_en: This is a hands-on article sharing a year of experience using Claude Code for programming. The author walks through six real-world cases, demonstrating core techniques like CLAUDE.md, Skill, Hook, and Sub-agent, while also sharing impressions of the Claude Fable 5 model. The writing is both humorous and practical, offering valuable insights for developers who rely heavily on AI-assisted coding.

items.title: 白嫖DeepSeek V4 Pro！免费无限用，还能接入Claude-Code
items.description: 先放个结论：按星哥的步骤配置完，你就能在本地工具里直接调用 DeepSeek V4 Pro 的免费额度，不用充值，不用复杂操作，5 步就能搞定！ 免费的模型： 一、准备工作 想薅这个羊毛，提前准备好这
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章介绍了如何通过简单五步配置，在本地开发工具中免费无限使用DeepSeek V4 Pro模型，无需充值即可调用其强大能力，甚至还能接入Claude-Code。作者提供了详细的准备工作与操作指南，手把手教用户“薅羊毛”。对于AI开发者和爱好者而言，这是一份极具价值的省钱攻略，能让他们在不花费任何成本的情况下使用顶级AI模型加速编程和创作。
items.summary_en: This tutorial explains how to configure local development tools to use the DeepSeek V4 Pro model for free and unlimited access with just five simple steps, and also covers integrating Claude-Code. The guide, written by a blogger known as 'Xing Ge', provides detailed instructions to help developers and AI enthusiasts leverage top-tier AI models without spending a dime. It is a valuable resource for programmers and creators looking to accelerate their workflows using cutting-edge AI at zero cost.

items.title: 网传 Google 内部称 Gemini 模型竞争力下降至行业第四，具体情况如何？下降原因可能有哪些？
items.summary_zh: 近日传闻Google内部评估认为Gemini模型在行业中的竞争力已滑落至第四位，落后于OpenAI、Anthropic等对手。这一排名变化反映出大模型赛道竞争白热化，可能是由于Gemini在推理能力、多模态表现或商业化落地进展上未能跟上第一梯队。对Google而言，这不仅动摇其AI领导者形象，还可能影响云服务和搜索业务的长期生态。对于开发者与企业用户，这意味着选择模型时需要更谨慎评估性能差异。
items.summary_en: Rumors are swirling that Google internally ranked its Gemini model fourth in the industry, trailing behind OpenAI, Anthropic, and others. This slide underscores the intense competition in the large language model space, where rivals have surged ahead in reasoning, multimodal performance, or commercial deployment. If true, it’s a wake-up call for Google, threatening its AI leadership and potentially impacting its cloud and search ecosystems. For developers and enterprises, it means the model landscape is shifting fast, and picking the right AI now requires more careful benchmarking than ever.

items.title: 阿里巴巴股价创年内新低，市值跌破 2 万亿港元，有哪些影响因素？何时能重回估值上行通道？
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴股价近期触及年内低点，总市值跌破2万亿港元，主要受国内消费复苏乏力、云业务增速放缓以及国际监管不确定性的影响。此外，来自拼多多、抖音电商的竞争加剧也令投资者担忧。市场普遍认为，要重回上行通道，阿里需在核心电商之外找到新的增长引擎，比如AI云服务或海外业务，同时等待宏观经济回暖。对于投资者而言，短期内仍需观望政策信号和财报表现。
items.summary_en: Alibaba's shares hit a new year-to-date low, dragging its market cap below 2 trillion HKD. The drop stems from a sluggish domestic consumption recovery, slowing cloud revenue growth, and ongoing regulatory uncertainty. Intensified competition from PDD and Douyin’s e-commerce arm is also weighing on investor sentiment. Analysts believe a rebound hinges on Alibaba finding fresh growth drivers beyond e-commerce—like its AI-powered cloud or overseas expansion—alongside a broader economic upturn. For now, investors are watching for policy cues and the next earnings report to gauge any turnaround.

items.title: 苹果官宣涨价，Mac 及 iPad 多款产品调价幅度达 20%，此次涨价影响有多大？你能接受吗？
items.summary_zh: 苹果突然官宣上调Mac和iPad多款产品价格，幅度高达20%，涉及全球多个市场。调整原因包括汇率波动、零部件成本上升以及部分地区关税调整。这一涨价对消费者的直接影响是购机门槛变高，尤其是教育用户和轻度办公人群可能会转向性价比更高的Windows或Android设备。对苹果来说，涨价虽能短期维持利润率，但也面临销量下滑风险。目前业界关注消费者是否会因涨价而推迟换机周期。
items.summary_en: Apple officially announced price hikes of up to 20% on several Mac and iPad models across multiple markets, citing currency fluctuations, rising component costs, and tariff adjustments. This move directly raises the barrier for consumers, especially students and casual users, who might now consider cheaper Windows laptops or Android tablets instead. While the price increase helps Apple protect its margins in the short term, it risks slowing sales and extending upgrade cycles. The big question is whether Apple’s loyal fanbase will absorb the premium or start looking elsewhere.

items.title: 七部门发文加快培育 AI 一人公司，专家称「有助于让人才以极低成本创业」，当代年轻人如何抓住政策机遇？
items.summary_zh: 中国七部门联合发文，鼓励发展由AI驱动的“一人公司”，即个体创业者借助AI工具以极低成本开办企业。专家指出，这项政策旨在降低人才创业门槛，让更多年轻人能在不组建团队的情况下利用AI完成设计、客服、营销等工作。对年轻人而言，关键在于快速掌握AI工具的应用场景，瞄准轻资产服务或内容创作领域，同时注意合规和知识产权问题。这可能是数字时代新一轮个体崛起的信号。
items.summary_en: Seven Chinese government departments jointly issued a policy to promote AI-powered 'one-person companies,' enabling individuals to start businesses with minimal costs by leveraging AI tools for design, customer service, marketing, and more. Experts see this as a way to lower the startup barrier, letting young talents launch ventures without hiring a team. For young entrepreneurs, the opportunity lies in mastering AI applications in asset-light services or content creation, while staying mindful of regulatory compliance and IP issues. It signals a potential wave of solo entrepreneurship in the digital era.

items.title: SpaceX 暴跌 16% 股份逼近挂牌价，谷歌狂跌 5%，为何科技股开始下跌？未来走向可能如何？
items.summary_zh: 近日科技股遭遇抛售，SpaceX股价暴跌16%逼近其上市挂牌价，谷歌也大跌5%，引发市场震动。主要原因包括美国长期利率攀升压制成长股估值、部分科技公司财报不及预期，以及AI投资过热后获利回吐。对于未来走向，分析师认为短期仍有回调压力，但长期取决于AI商业化能否兑现高增长。对投资者来说，需警惕过度集中持仓AI概念股的风险，适当分散配置价值板块。
items.summary_en: Tech stocks took a hit recently, with SpaceX shares plunging 16% toward its listing price and Google dropping 5%, rattling the market. The sell-off is driven by rising long-term interest rates compressing growth stock valuations, disappointing earnings from some tech giants, and profit-taking after the AI rally. Looking ahead, analysts warn of further short-term correction, but the long-term picture hinges on whether AI commercialization can deliver the promised high growth. For investors, this is a reminder to avoid overconcentration in AI-themed stocks and consider diversifying into value sectors for balance.

items.title: 美飞行员曝伊朗「创新武器」，简直是外星来的东西，具体情况如何？伊朗无人机研发是什么水平？
items.summary_zh: 据报道，一名美国飞行员曝光了伊朗一种被他形容为“来自外星”的创新武器，引发外界对伊朗军事科技水平的广泛讨论。该武器据称在设计与性能上远超传统认知，尤其体现在无人机研发领域。伊朗近年来在无人机技术上投入巨大，从仿制到创新，已能生产多种侦察和攻击型无人机，部分机型甚至具备隐身和蜂群作战能力。虽然具体细节尚待证实，但这一事件再次凸显了伊朗在非对称武器发展上的独特思路和实际成果，也让人们对未来区域军事平衡产生新的关注。
items.summary_en: An American pilot has reportedly revealed an Iranian weapon so innovative that he described it as 'something from outer space,' sparking widespread discussion about Iran's military technological capabilities. The weapon is said to far exceed conventional designs, especially in the field of drone development. Iran has invested heavily in drone technology, evolving from imitation to innovation, and now produces various reconnaissance and attack drones, some featuring stealth and swarm combat capabilities. While specifics await verification, this incident highlights Iran's unconventional approach to asymmetric weapons development and its tangible achievements, prompting renewed attention to future regional military balances.

items.title: 如何看待九成高报师用 AI 辅助填志愿？学生跳过高报师直接用 AI 报志愿可行吗？
items.summary_zh: 眼下近九成高考志愿填报师都在借助AI工具辅助决策，这背后折射出AI处理海量数据的高效与精准。但学生能否完全跳过专业人士、直接让AI代劳填志愿呢？现存问题在于，AI缺乏对考生个性、家庭情况的深层理解，也难以应对政策变化中的微妙博弈。贸然依赖AI可能忽略自身的真实倾向和风险偏好，反而陷入“数据陷阱”。这一讨论提醒我们，AI是强大助手，却无法替代人类的综合判断与情感支持。
items.summary_en: A recent report reveals that nearly 90% of Chinese college application consultants now rely on AI to help students choose their majors and schools. This trend highlights AI's ability to quickly process vast amounts of admission data and historical trends, making recommendations more efficient. However, the question arises: can students bypass these professionals and let AI handle their applications directly? While AI can offer data-driven suggestions, it lacks the nuanced understanding of a student's personal interests, family context, and risk tolerance that a human consultant provides. Over-reliance on AI may lead to suboptimal decisions, especially when policies change unpredictably. The discussion underscores that AI is a powerful tool but cannot replace the empathy and strategic judgment of a trained advisor.
